source_preservation_rule: Source notes and frozen manifests must remain byte-identical; AI may write only a maintenance proposal.

proposals.observed_fact: Both Alpha notes share the frozen canonical key alpha-launch-plan. The project brief records beta dependencies on the accessibility pass and partner review checklist, while the accessibility note adds keyboard navigation, contrast review, and reduced motion requirements.
proposals.proposed_change: Ask a human reviewer to merge these complementary Alpha launch details into one maintained note or explicitly keep the split if the editorial model requires separate planning and accessibility notes.
proposals.source_preservation_rule: Source notes and frozen manifests must remain byte-identical; AI may write only a maintenance proposal.
proposals.reason: The shared canonical key supports a merge candidate, and the bodies are complementary rather than duplicate.

proposals.observed_fact: The payment note says invoices are due in 30 days, but current-sources.json says sources/billing-policy-2026.md now claims invoices for new contracts are due in 14 days and supersedes notes/payment-policy.md.
proposals.proposed_change: Flag notes/payment-policy.md as stale for human review and update only after approval against sources/billing-policy-2026.md.
proposals.source_preservation_rule: Source notes and frozen manifests must remain byte-identical; AI may write only a maintenance proposal.
proposals.reason: The frozen current source directly contradicts the note and identifies the note as superseded.

proposals.observed_fact: The vendor summary has an empty source_path and says it records a provider response-time claim without naming a source file or URL.
proposals.proposed_change: Ask a human reviewer to provide the missing source path or URL; do not invent a source for this note.
proposals.source_preservation_rule: Source notes and frozen manifests must remain byte-identical; AI may write only a maintenance proposal.
proposals.reason: The note contains an unsourced claim and the manifest expects source-needed, but no auditable source is present in the allowed inputs.

proposals.observed_fact: notes/lonely-idea.md appears in link-graph.json nodes and has no edge where it is the from path or the to path, giving it zero out-degree and zero in-degree.
proposals.proposed_change: Ask a human reviewer to decide whether notes/lonely-idea.md should remain disconnected, receive links, or be retired.
proposals.source_preservation_rule: Source notes and frozen manifests must remain byte-identical; AI may write only a maintenance proposal.
proposals.reason: The frozen graph proves the orphan condition without requiring edits to the note.

proposals.observed_fact: Both pricing notes share canonical key pricing-page but preserve competing source paths: sources/pricing-public.md says Pro is priced per seat per month on the public page, while sources/pricing-sales.md says contracted Pro accounts use annual-only pricing in the sales memo.
proposals.proposed_change: Route the pricing-page pair to human conflict review while preserving both source paths and their scoped claims.
proposals.source_preservation_rule: Source notes and frozen manifests must remain byte-identical; AI may write only a maintenance proposal.
proposals.reason: The claims can both be true in different contexts, so the proposal should preserve both sources instead of collapsing them automatically.

proposals.observed_fact: notes/team-rituals.md is current, says no maintenance action is needed, links to alpha-project-brief, and is also linked from research-index in link-graph.json.
proposals.proposed_change: Take no maintenance action for notes/team-rituals.md.
proposals.source_preservation_rule: Source notes and frozen manifests must remain byte-identical; AI may write only a maintenance proposal.
proposals.reason: The note is connected in the frozen graph and no allowed current source contradicts it, so restraint is the auditable action.
